content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Restored best-effort bead-summary loading for `project create-from-bead` so transient `br list --json` failures fall back to empty live summaries while corrupt bead data still hard-fails, filtered direct upstream blockers out of shared-acceptance planned-elsewhere expansion so blockers are not re-labeled as out-of-scope work, and updated the stale CLI fake-`br` fixtures to serve both `show` and `list --json` so the six `run_sync_milestone_*` regressions pass again. Added focused regression coverage for the fallback behavior and the upstream shared-acceptance filter while keeping the prompt contract and surrounding behavior stable.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspected the create-from-bead bead-summary loading path, planned-elsewhere shared-acceptance expansion, and the failing `run_sync_milestone_*` CLI fixtures to isolate the regressions introduced by the latest prompt-generation changes.
2. [Completed] Patched `src/cli/project.rs` so generic bead-summary I/O failures degrade to an empty summary map while corrupt bead data still aborts, preserving the old best-effort behavior outside prompt corruption cases.
3. [Completed] Updated planned-elsewhere shared-acceptance derivation to skip direct upstream dependency ids so blockers stay represented only in dependency context instead of being re-labeled as planned-elsewhere scope.
4. [Completed] Refactored the affected CLI fixtures in `tests/cli.rs` to use the default `show + list --json` fake `br` helper, renamed and updated the unavailable-`br list` regression to assert successful fallback, and added a unit regression for the upstream shared-acceptance filter.
5. [Completed] Ran formatting plus focused unit and CLI test slices covering create-from-bead fallback behavior, planned-elsewhere filtering, and the repaired `run_sync_milestone_*` flows.

## Validation Evidence

- `cargo fmt --all` passed.
- `cargo test build_planned_elsewhere_context_excludes_upstream_dependencies_from_shared_acceptance_owners --lib -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test build_planned_elsewhere_context_ --lib -- --nocapture` passed (6 tests).
- `cargo test --test unit create_project_from_bead_context_ -- --nocapture` passed (13 tests).
- `cargo test project_create_from_bead_falls_back_when_br_list_is_unavailable --test cli -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test project_create_from_bead_ --test cli -- --nocapture` passed (22 tests).
- `cargo test run_sync_milestone_ --test cli -- --nocapture` passed (6 tests), including the six previously failing `run_sync_milestone_*` cases.

## Outstanding Risks

- On transient `br list --json` failures, prompt generation now succeeds by falling back to relation/plan data, so some live summary-derived titles or statuses may still be less complete than when bead summaries load successfully.
- I validated the touched prompt-generation and CLI repair paths, but I did not rerun the full repository test suite or `br lint` in this remediation pass.
- The unrelated untracked `.ralph-burning/` directory remains in the worktree and was left untouched.
